## NetworkRequest type

Mutable request descriptor. Listeners can modify `url`<!-- -->, `method`<!-- -->, and `headers` before the fetch is sent.

**Signature:**

```typescript
type NetworkRequest = {
    url: string;
    method: "GET" | "POST";
    headers: Headers;
    inFlight: boolean;
    cancelled: boolean;
    promise: NetworkResponsePromise;
};
```
**References:** [NetworkResponsePromise](/reference/cmaf-lite.networkresponsepromise)
